task.json description, OrientDB default database credentials (https://orientdb.com/docs/2.2.x/Database-Security.html)

privileged_info_summary: The database uses OrientDB with a demodb instance. Access credentials are: admin user with password 'admin' for database access, and root user with password 'GymAnything123!' for server-level access. The report file is created at /home/ga/graph_analysis_report.txt. The database is seeded with synthetic travel agency data including Hotels (15 total), Profiles (17 total), Countries (12 total), Restaurants (11 total), and various graph edges representing relationships between these entities.
